given: a warehouse operator viewing the SKU detail screen for a stock position
then: the opaque combined tracking code is no longer displayed anywhere on the screen; only the distinct batch and serial fields represent that information
architectural_notes: E2E: the JSON boundary (app/routes) no longer exposes the combined inventory_code (dropped by the S1 migration), so the SPA renders no combined-code element anywhere on the SKU detail view, only the distinct batch and serial fields. The retirement is a contract on the boundary's response shape enforced end to end through stock-service and stock-repository against the paired branch; no domain logic changes. Owner: app/routes detail-endpoint response contract + client SKU-detail component.

independence.rationale: AC1 asserts the new batch and serial fields are present and labelled; this AC adds the distinct outcome that the old combined code is retired from the view. The combined code could still be shown alongside the new fields (breaking this AC while AC1 stays green), and the new fields could be wrong or unlabelled while the combined code is correctly gone (breaking AC1 while this stays green).
